content: lib/autorun.cf  Table of contents file bodies control Prototype: control Implementation: code body file control { services_autorun|services_autorun_inputs :: inputs => { @(services_autorun.found_inputs) }; } agent bundles autorun Prototype: autorun Implementation: code bundle agent autorun { vars : services_autorun|services_autorun_bundles :: " bundles " slist => bundlesmatching ( ".*" , "autorun" ); " sorted_bundles " slist => sort ( "bundles" , "lex" ), comment => "Lexicographically sorted bundles for predictable order" ; methods : services_autorun|services_autorun_bundles :: "autorun" -> { "CFE-3795" } usebundle => $ ( sorted_bundles ), action => immediate ; reports : DEBUG|DEBUG_autorun|DEBUG_services_autorun :: "DEBUG $(this.bundle) : found bundle $(sorted_bundles) with tag 'autorun'" ; }
